search_query: how to pour a perfect Guinness
combined_text: How to Serve and Enjoy Guinness 1 Choose the right glass. Although it may seem that any glass will do, to enjoy a truly perfect glass of Guinness you must use a tulip glass. The shape of a tulip glass is perfect for allowing the nitrogen bubbles to circulate from the bottom and back up to the top. Although any size will do, a 16oz
